================================================================================
string_basic
================================================================================
a="foo"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string)))))

================================================================================
string_multiline
================================================================================
a=

  \\foo
  \\bar
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (multiline_string)))))

================================================================================
string_multiline_with_string
================================================================================

main =
    \\"test"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (multiline_string)))))

================================================================================
string_multiline_wierd
================================================================================

main =
    \\ " '"' \n \t #hi
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (multiline_string
          (escape_char)
          (escape_char))))))

================================================================================
string_wierd
================================================================================

main =
    "'\"' \n \t #hi"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string
          (escape_char)
          (escape_char)
          (escape_char))))))

================================================================================
string_comment
================================================================================

main =
    "#hi"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string)))))

================================================================================
string_interpolation
================================================================================
msg = "Hello, ${name}!"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string
          (interpolation_char
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

================================================================================
string_interpolation_expr
================================================================================
msg = "Result: ${x + 1}"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string
          (interpolation_char
            (bin_op_expr
              part: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              part: (operator)
              part: (const
                (int)))))))))

================================================================================
string_unicode_escape
================================================================================
nbsp = "\u(00A0)\u(A)\u(00A00A)"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (string
          (escape_char)
          (escape_char)
          (escape_char))))))

================================================================================
line_string_simple
================================================================================
msg =
    \\Hello
    \\World
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (multiline_string)))))

================================================================================
line_string_with_interpolation
================================================================================
msg =
    \\Hello ${name}
    \\Count: ${x + 1}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (multiline_string
          (interpolation_char
            (variable_expr
              (identifier)))
          (interpolation_char
            (bin_op_expr
              part: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              part: (operator)
              part: (const
                (int)))))))))
